data.title: knip dead-code sweep: remove verified-unused files, devDep, exports & types

data.body:
Dead-code sweep driven by a one-off 'pnpm dlx knip' run (knip not added as a dep). Knip default-config findings to TRIAGE (each must be grep-verified before removal; default config can yield false positives):
FILES: src/components/three/Skyline.tsx, src/hooks/use-mobile.tsx. (Ignore notes/.recovered/*.tsx — not real source.)
DEV DEP: @testing-library/user-event.
EXPORTS (12): OUTER_NAV_NODES (OctahedronHero), VISIBLE_HOUSES + NAVBAR_VISIBLE_HOUSES + getHouseBySlug + getPeopleByHouse + getHousesByPerson (houses.ts), LAB_DOCUMENTS_HIDDEN + getDocumentsByTag + getDocumentsByAuthor + getPrimaryAuthorId + getPublishedDocuments (lab-documents.ts), storyPhotos (storyPhotos.ts).
TYPES (8): NavNode, ButtonProps, ExternalLink, PersonSocials, HousePalette, StoryPhoto, SearchResultType, SearchResultGroup.
Approach: verify each with grep across src/ (incl tests). Delete only items with ZERO references. Keep anything that's a verified false positive (used dynamically/in tests/as a barrel). For exports/types, removing the export keyword may not be enough if the symbol is internally used — only delete the whole declaration if fully unreferenced. Acceptance: typecheck/build/conformance pass; tests at FRAC-199 baseline (7), no new; a fresh 'pnpm dlx knip' run shows the removed items gone (remaining items, if any, documented with rationale).

REVIEW: PASS. Reviewed cold against plan task_01KV9XA866J4QSD15PM7GWRC30.md. Diff matches plan exactly (13 SAFE-DELETE + 8 DOWNGRADE-EXPORT, 0 unintended changes).

DELETION SAFETY (zero dangling refs): grep -rn across src/ for every deleted symbol returned ZERO stray references. Skyline + use-mobile/useIsMobile: 0 importers. OUTER_NAV_NODES survives only in legit spots (heroNavNodes.ts decl, Hero.tsx import, OctahedronHero line-104 internal import + line-1015 use); the dead re-export on old line 105 is gone, line-104 import preserved. VISIBLE_HOUSES, NAVBAR_VISIBLE_HOUSES, getHouseBySlug, getPeopleByHouse, getHousesByPerson, LAB_DOCUMENTS_HIDDEN, getDocumentsByTag, getDocumentsByAuthor, getPrimaryAuthorId, getPublishedDocuments: all fully removed, 0 remaining refs.

DOWNGRADES (body kept, only export removed, internally used, NOT externally imported): storyPhotos (used by gallerySections L48-88; external imports are GallerySection/gallerySections only), StoryPhoto (L9/L18), ButtonProps (L126 forwardRef; tests import Button/buttonVariants not ButtonProps), ExternalLink (L53), PersonSocials (L23), HousePalette (L49), SearchResultType (L13/236/241), SearchResultGroup (L256/267/294). None imported cross-file -> no build break.

KEPT items confirmed present: NAVBAR_HIDDEN_ROUTES, Person, House (houses.ts); getFeaturedDocuments/getRegularDocuments/getAllTags/getTagCounts/formatAuthors (lab-documents.ts); GallerySection/gallerySections (storyPhotos.ts); OUTER_NAV_NODES/NavNode decls (heroNavNodes.ts). package.json: @testing-library/user-event removed; pnpm-lock.yaml updated; 0 userEvent refs in src/.

PIPELINE: pnpm typecheck PASS, pnpm build PASS, pnpm conformance PASS, pnpm test 7 failed / 148 passed (155 total) = exact FRAC-199 baseline; failing files are buttons/footer/navigation/neighborhood pre-existing styling assertions, none touch deleted code, no NEW failures. Fresh pnpm dlx knip: only notes/.recovered/LiberalArts-stash-20260608.tsx remains (documented non-source stash exception); all 21 swept items gone.

MINOR (non-blocking, cosmetic): heroNavNodes.ts comment lines 2 & 5 still say 'importing OUTER_NAV_NODES from OctahedronHero still works via a re-export' — that re-export was the thing deleted, so the comment is now stale. No functional impact. Optional tidy.

Meets all 7 acceptance criteria. Recommend -> done.
